title: Apocalyptic Power Fantasy
description: it's the apocalypse! luckily you're a badass
body:
The Zombie Apocalypse has begun-

and so has the other Zombie Apocalypse

and a horrifying Fungal Infection 

and another Zombie Apocalypse...


it looks like the world is pretty doomed, luckily there are all kinds of ways to empower yourself against the multitude of threats at your doorstep!
ars nouveau, biomancy, overpowered skill trees, magical tarot cards, and more!

There are additional resource packs [Goety: The Dark Arts](https://github.com/Polarice3/Goety-2) and [Quark!](https://github.com/VazkiiMods/Quark)
